subject: Create hadith_minimal.yaml fixtures
description:
Create data/fixtures/hadith_minimal.yaml with:
- 3-5 hadith from Sahih Bukhari (public domain/narrations)
- Canonical IDs: hadith:bukhari:sahih:1, hadith:bukhari:sahih:2, etc.
- Arabic text and English translation
- Proper metadata (source, license, attribution)
